data.title: Grand opening of October 2025 Global Sources Hong Kong Shows Phase I at AsiaWorld-Expo, running from Oct 11 to 14.
data.description: On October 11, 2025, the Phase I of Global Sources Hong Kong Shows kicked off at AsiaWorld-Expo. The event, adhering to the theme "Where Cutting-Edge Technology Meets Digital Entertainment", is the first of three phases and will run until October 14. The trade show attracts a significant international audience, highlighting the latest trends and innovations in various industries.

data.title: NOW by Xfinity named top prepaid mobile and internet plan in 2025 by Expert Consumers for affordable, no-contract connectivity.
data.description: In a recent report, Expert Consumers named NOW by Xfinity as one of the top prepaid mobile and internet plans for 2025. The brand was acknowledged for providing a cost-effective, contract-free connectivity option for consumers. The recognition highlights the brand's appeal to customers looking for transparent pricing and reliable services.

data.title: $460M raised by Galaxy Digital to repurpose Texas Bitcoin mine into AI data center.
data.description: Galaxy Digital, founded by Mike Novogratz, has successfully obtained a $460 million investment to transform its previous Bitcoin mining location in Texas into a substantial AI data center.

data.title: Improved GitHub Copilot CLI boosts efficiency with faster task completion and concise responses based on community input.
data.description: Updates have been launched by GitHub for its Copilot CLI, aiming to boost speed and efficiency based on community input. The enhancements bring about decreased task completion duration and more concise responses for users.

data.title: Gala Games debuts upgraded inventory system for Town Star, boosting player experience with improved visuals and foundational upgrades.
data.description: Gala Games has launched an upgraded inventory system for Town Star, aimed at enhancing the gaming experience for players. The new system features improved visuals and foundational upgrades to facilitate future developments within the game. This revamp is expected to significantly impact the player base, providing them with a more streamlined and efficient way to manage their in-game items and resources.
"Japan’s LDP race could move the yen again. In 2024, Takahashi’s lead sent USD/JPY up 500 points. With Koizumi and Takeuchi now in play, traders are watching closely for a repeat. "

data.title: Northwest Registered Agent named top service for new entity formation in Delaware by Better Business Advice. Privacy and data protection emphasized.
data.description: In recent news dated October 11, 2025, Better Business Advice has identified Northwest Registered Agent as a top provider for establishing new entities in Delaware. This acknowledgment highlights the company's commitment to safeguarding privacy and data security while focusing on creating sustainable entities for individuals and businesses.

data.title: Theon to buy 9.8% stake in Exosens for €268.7 million, becoming second largest shareholder. Deal expected to close in Q1 2026.
data.description: Theon International Plc (THEON) has finalized an agreement to acquire a 9.8% stake in Exosens SA (EXOSENS) for €268.7 million, equating to €54.0 per share. Exosens is renowned for its advanced electro-optical technologies. THEON will be the second largest shareholder in EXOSENS post the deal with Groupe HLD remaining the largest shareholder. The transaction closure hinges on regulatory approvals across select countries and is anticipated to occur in early Q1 2026. The complete details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: MAISON CEO Chen Kan redefines spatial value as 'inhabitable collectibles', focusing on elite demand shift.
data.description: In Shanghai, MAISON's Co-founder and CEO Chen Kan emphasized the concept of spatial value by describing top-tier residences as "inhabitable collectibles." Kan believes that the worth of luxury homes surpasses mere location, as elite clients now seek properties that offer not just function but also spiritual connection. This shift reflects a growing demand among global elites for residences that provide a deeper level of satisfaction. The perspective shared by Chen Kan resonates with the evolving preferences in the market for exclusive properties.

data.title: Kelun-Biotech's TROP2 ADC Sac-TMT approved by NMPA for EGFRm NSCLC. Effective after EGFR-TKI therapy.
data.description: On October 11, 2025 in Chengdu, China, Sichuan Kelun-Biotech Biopharmaceutical Co., Ltd. revealed the development of their trophoblast cell-surface antigen 2 (TROP2)-directed antibody-drug conjugate (ADC) known as sacituzumab tirumotecan (sac-TMT or SKB264/MK-2870).

data.title: San Diego Zoo Wildlife Alliance reveals progress in creating biobank network for all endangered species by 2075.
data.description: San Diego Zoo Wildlife Alliance made a groundbreaking announcement on October 11, 2025, revealing significant advancement in its initiative to biobank every endangered species by 2075. The organization has embarked on a monumental call to action, urging all stakeholders to join this collective effort. This marks the first time the organization has disclosed tangible progress towards this ambitious goal. Through this initiative, the alliance aims to preserve the genetic material of all endangered species for future conservation efforts.

data.title: Credit card churners make money by continually signing up for new cards, exploiting bonuses and rewards.
data.description: In a recent report, it has been revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to a record low of 3.5%. This marks a significant decrease from the previous rate of 4.2%. The data also shows that the economy added over 500,000 new jobs in the last quarter alone. Analysts attribute this positive trend to strong consumer spending and a robust job market. Additionally, the report indicates that wages have increased by an average of 3.8% compared to last year. Overall, the findings suggest a healthy and growing economy with promising prospects for the workforce.

data.title: Bitcoin's surprising October dip goes against history, but experts predict a quick recovery as October usually sees gains.
data.description: Experts in the market are pointing out a rare drop in Bitcoin's value this month, which is typically a time when gains are seen. Looking at past data, it is predicted that there could be a quick recovery in the near future.

data.title: Discord Inc. under investigation for data breach involving at least 70,000 user records.
data.description: An investigation is underway by Schubert Jonckheer & Kolbe LLP in San Francisco regarding a data breach that exposed the sensitive data of a minimum of 70,000 users of Discord, Inc., a technology firm based in California. The breach granted unauthorized access to user information.

data.title: Trade tensions resurge as China restricts trade and Trump threatens tariffs, sparking economic confrontation.
data.description: Trade tensions between Beijing and Washington have escalated rapidly as both sides attempt to assert their economic interests. President Trump's threats of tariffs and Beijing's trade restrictions have heightened the conflict between the two largest economies in the world. This escalation highlights the potential for confrontation as both countries navigate complex trade dynamics.

data.title: Bitcoin ETFs see $2.71B weekly inflows during 'Uptober', despite brief market outflow after Trump's tariff remarks.
data.description: During the week, US spot Bitcoin ETFs experienced an influx of $2.71 billion in investments. This increase occurred despite a temporary outflow in the market prompted by comments from President Trump regarding tariffs on China.

data.title: LOTUS project debuts in Hangzhou on Oct. 10, 2025, redefining premium real estate with emotional value.
data.description: The global unveiling of the LOTUS development took place in Hangzhou on October 10, 2025. This project marks a significant shift in premium real estate within Olympic-themed destinations by infusing emotional value into its architectural design. The development aims to transcend geographical limitations and set new standards in the industry.

data.title: Hinen, one of Australia's Top 5 Battery Manufacturers (SunWiz 2025), to exhibit full residential energy storage lineup at All-Energy Australia 2025.
data.description: Hinen, a leading battery manufacturer in Australia, has been recognized as one of the top five companies in the country by SunWiz in 2025. They are set to exhibit their complete line of residential energy storage solutions at the All-Energy event. This includes a wide range of products designed to meet the energy storage needs of households. Don’t miss the opportunity to explore Hinen’s innovative offerings at the exhibition.
